name: Tanya, The Wolf Distortion
description:
Out of all of the Project Moon characters that are on this website, I don't see best girl, Tanya. So much for sleeper agents in this place. Fine, I'll do it myself. Now, I'm no scholar of project moon games and their insane story and characters so please give me a bit of leeway of describing characters and stories. I've seen only let's play of said game and the wiki of the plot of Library of Ruina.

Introducing Tanya. A gang member-turned-Distortion from the game Library of Ruina, who is nicknamed "L'Heure du loup" after Robert R. McCammon's novel The Wolf's Hour. After distorting, she is recruited by Argalia along with greta_(lor) and other Distortions into the Reverberation Ensemble to storm the titular library together.

The character Tanya belongs to Project Moon and the art for this is drawn by Maxpawbs on Tumblr.
creator: 2themax
